name: Run Full Pipeline
description: Manually triggered — runs the complete Write → Critique → Optimize pipeline on the current song file (SOP 07 condensed)

then.prompt: Read .kiro/sops/07-full-pipeline.md and run it on the currently open song file. Quick version: 1) Score it using the 12-category rubric (Core composite). 2) If composite ≥8.5: proceed directly to Suno optimization. 3) If composite 7.0-8.4: identify the top 3 issues, suggest fixes, and ask if I want to auto-revise. 4) If composite <7.0: explain what's not working and suggest a new approach. Report the composite score, strongest line, and next action.
